data.notes: This attack requires concentration by the character, as he attempts put purposely knock his opponent unconscious with one blow. And works either empty handed or with a melee weapon. The character must first forfeit initiative (unless he is performing a surprise attack), and will spend the first part of the round concentrating. If he is struck during this round he loses his attack. If he hasn't been hit then he will strike at a -3 to his opponent. If the strike is successful he has willed himself to do just enough damage to knock his oppon ent out. No damage is rolled, and no damage is taken, the opponent is simply knocked unconscious for 1D10 x2 minutes. The opponent does get a chance to avoid being knocked out by rolling under his save at –5
